narrative:
Springfield City has 31,019 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a clear Democratic lean of 6.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.7% D−R vs +9.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
